sections.sectionTitle: A Piangsak, A Kem, Pasian Phat Un

verses.text: No thuman mite aw, Topa tungah lungdam un! Pahtawina pen thutangte tawh kilawm kituak hi
Laia khausai lasakna tawh Topa phat un la, harp zang sawm khausai lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un
Ama tungah la thak sa un la, a gingpha mahmahin hoihtakin khausai tum un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa thutang a, ama hihna khempeuh thuman tawh a sem hi
Amah in thuman leh thutang deih a, leitungah Topa' itna kip a kidim hi
Topa' kampauna tawh vantung piang a, a kam pana husan'na tawh vantung nate a piang hi
Amah in tuipi tuite thawl khat sunga thun bangin mun khatah gawm a, tuithukpite tuibeem-ah a koih hi
Leitung khempeuh in Topa zahtak uh hen la, leitunga tengte khempeuh, amah lamdangsakna tawh ding ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pau a, leitung hong piang hi; amah in thu pia a, na khempeuh hong om hi
Topa in minamte' thungaihsutna a mawkna suahin, mite' geelna a khaktan hi
Topa' thungaihsutna kip ngitnget a, ama lungsim ngaihsutna khang tawntungin a kip hi
Topa, Pasian-a a nei minam, ama luah dingin teelna a ngah minamte thupha ngah ahi hi
Topa in vantung panin hong ensuk a, mihing khempeuh a mu hi
A tutna mun panin amah hong dakkhia-in, leitung mite a en hi
Amau' lungsim a bawlpa in amaute' gamtatnate en gige hi
Kumpi khat a galkap tampite in suaktasak zolo a, galkap hangpa ama hatna tawh kihonkhia zolo hi
Sakol galkapte pen gualzawhna dingin a mawkna lametna hi a, amau' hatna tawh hon zolo hi
Amah a zahtakte, a itna kip lametna a neite, sihna panin honkhia-in, kialpi hun sungin amaute a hin'kep theihna dingin Topa in amaute en tawntung hi
Topa i ngak hi; amah pen eite hong huhpa leh i lum ahi hi
Ama min siangtho eite in muang ihih manin ama sungah i lungdam hi
Topa aw, nang kong lamet uh mah bangin kote' tungah na itna kip hong omsak in.
